text.title: regulatory-compliance-2026 Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for regulatory-compliance-2026 as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Claiming "undue burden" without a documented cost analysis and alternative access plan.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Courts and regulators reject undocumented exemptions; the burden of proof is on the organization claiming the exemption.
